judge.reason: The primary purpose of __alloc_skb is to allocate and initialize an sk_buff structure, including its data buffer. The refcount_set call for SKB_ALLOC_FCLONE skbs is only a minor initialization step among many (skbuff_clear, kmalloc_reserve, __finalize_skb_around). The function does not primarily manage reference counts; it is an allocation function with incidental refcount setup.
